authorization_phrase_detected: YES start P186 production DB migration authorization gate only

G1_approve_dedup_policy.description: CEO explicitly approves MAX(id) dedup policy: keep the row with highest id per (lottery_type, target_draw, strategy_id)
G1_approve_dedup_policy.impact: 160 rows permanently removed from production DB (cannot be recovered without backup restore)
G1_approve_dedup_policy.dropped_rows_provenance: ALL NULL — confirmed no production-quality provenance

G2_approve_dropping_160_rows.description: CEO explicitly approves dropping exactly 160 NULL-provenance duplicate rows

G3_approve_table_recreation.description: CEO approves full table recreation (CREATE new / INSERT SELECT / DROP / RENAME) because UNIQUE constraint changes from (lottery_type, target_draw, strategy_id, replay_run_id) to (lottery_type, target_draw, strategy_id, bet_index)
G3_approve_table_recreation.reason: SQLite has no DROP CONSTRAINT; ALTER TABLE alone is insufficient

G4_approve_bet_index_column.description: CEO approves adding bet_index INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 column to strategy_prediction_replays

G5_approve_row_import.description: CEO approves importing 40622 multi-bet rows from zen-gates canonical research dataset (bet_index 2-5, 11 controlled_apply waves)

G6_approve_backup.description: CEO approves creating a timestamped immutable backup before any migration step

G7_approve_production_lock.description: CEO approves stopping all API writers (frontend/backend servers) before migration begins

G8_approve_exact_sql.description: CEO approves exact SQL script derived from P185 rehearsal log (outputs/research/power_lotto/p185_rehearsal/p185_row_delta_import_sql_log_20260601.sql)

G9_approve_validation.description: CEO approves post-migration validation: SELECT COUNT(*) = 94924, bet_index PRESENT, 0 duplicates, PRAGMA integrity_check = ok, drift guard PASS at 94924

G10_approve_rollback_plan.description: CEO approves rollback plan: if any validation fails, immediately restore from timestamped backup
G10_approve_rollback_plan.rollback_trigger: row count != 94924 OR duplicates > 0 OR integrity_check fails

G11_approve_no_controlled_apply.description: CEO acknowledges no controlled_apply will run during migration

G12_approve_no_research_restart.description: CEO acknowledges P178A closure policy remains active — no POWER_LOTTO research restart

Run reviewed migration SQL on production DB (dedup + table recreation + bet_index + row import)
Verify bet_index present in production DB

exact_authorization_phrase.phrase: YES execute P187 production DB migration from main 54462 to reconciled 94924 using P185 rehearsal SQL, approve MAX(id) dedup dropping 160 null-provenance duplicate rows, create timestamped backup, no controlled_apply
exact_authorization_phrase.note: P187 MUST NOT execute without this exact phrase. No paraphrase, partial quote, or synonym is accepted. If the phrase is absent, P187 must STOP and report P187_STOPPED_MISSING_EXACT_AUTHORIZATION_PHRASE.

destructive_migration_risk.note: Table recreation drops and recreates strategy_prediction_replays. Any error mid-migration may leave DB in inconsistent state. Must run in single transaction with immediate rollback on failure.

dedup_policy_risk.note: MAX(id) drops 160 rows permanently. Confirmed NULL provenance but cannot be recovered without backup. CEO explicit approval required.

row_import_lineage_risk.note: 40622 rows imported from zen-gates via ATTACH read-only. Wave attribution verified (11 waves). 120 rows have NULL controlled_apply_id (pre-tagging) — acceptable.

backup_restore_risk.note: If backup is not created or is corrupt, rollback is impossible. Backup must be created, verified (row count + file size), and chmod 444 before any migration SQL runs.

production_lock_risk.note: Concurrent writes during table recreation would corrupt the new table. All API writers must be stopped and verified stopped before migration begins.

test_compatibility_risk.note: After production migration: requires_zen_gates_db markers in contract tests should be removed or updated (main DB now has 94924 rows + bet_index). Drift guard expected count must be updated from 54462 to 94924. These are P187 post-migration cleanup steps.

rollback_risk.note: With a verified immutable backup, rollback is a single cp command. Risk is low if backup step is not skipped.

accidental_stage_commit_push_risk.note: P187 must not stage, commit, or push the DB file. DB file must remain in .gitignore or explicitly excluded.

main_zen_gates_split_resolution_risk.note: After P187, main DB will match zen-gates DB row count. The split is RESOLVED for DB but code/schema parity must be verified. Contract tests that were SKIP due to requires_zen_gates_db should be re-evaluated.

Stop all API writers (backend.pid / frontend.pid processes)
